title: Holosculpture
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''holosculpture''', or '''holosculpt''' was an artform in which a sculpture was projected through some sort of three-dimensional [[holograph]]ic medium, such as a [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] or [[Holoplate/Legends|holoplate]]. [[Ediorung]] produced popular, dynamic holosculptures.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
